author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: save_rng_state, restore_rng_state, stream_count, synchronize. Required for gradient checkpointing with dropout (Philox CBRNG state must be saved/restored to reproduce identical dropout masks). synchronize() maps to MTLCommandBuffer::waitUntilCompleted(). stream_count returns 1 on MPS (single command queue).
